description: Declaration-distance enrichment: decl_distance, decl_far_count, has_unused_reassign (dead store). Grounded on forgeql-pub.frozen — Rust source for distance metrics, C/C++ fixture for the dead-store pattern.

cases.name: decl_far_count_function
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/ast/index/file_indexer.rs' WHERE name='collect_nodes' WHERE decl_far_count=21 LIMIT 5

cases.name: decl_distance_exact
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/ast/index/file_indexer.rs' WHERE name='collect_nodes' WHERE decl_distance=789 LIMIT 5

cases.name: has_unused_reassign_dead_store
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE has_unused_reassign='true' LIMIT 10

cases.name: negative_no_unused_reassign_in_rust
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE has_unused_reassign='true' LIMIT 5

cases.name: negative_no_far_decl_in_small_rust
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE decl_far_count>=5 LIMIT 5
